---
title: "Test"
format:
  html:
    title-block: false 
    css: ../styles/cv_style.css
    toc: false
    sidebar: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.grid .gx-5}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .text-center}

![](../content/portrait_outdoor.jpg){.cv-photo}  


**Emilio Sánchez**  
_M.Sc. Landscape Ecology_  
<!-- esanchez@uni-muenster.de   -->
<!-- +123 456 7890 -->

<div class="cv-icons">
  <a href="https://github.com/ESA99"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
  <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0004-0348-5434"><i class="ai ai-orcid"></i></a>
  <a href="mailto:esanchez@uni-muenster.de"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a>
</div>

<!-- ### Languages -->

<!-- <div class="skill"> -->
<!-- <span>German</span> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-bar"> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-level skill-green" style="width:100%"></div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
<!-- </div> -->

<!-- <div class="skill"> -->
<!-- <span>English</span> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-bar"> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-level skill-green" style="width: 90%"></div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
<!-- </div> -->

<!-- <div class="skill"> -->
<!-- <span>Spanish</span> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-bar"> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-level skill-green" style="width: 90%"></div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
<!-- </div> -->

<!-- <div class="skill"> -->
<!-- <span>Swedish</span> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-bar"> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-level skill-green" style="width: 60%"></div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
<!-- </div> -->


<!-- ### Programming -->

<!-- <div class="skill"> -->
<!-- <span>R</span> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-bar"> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-level skill-purple" style="width:95%"></div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
<!-- </div> -->

<!-- <div class="skill"> -->
<!-- <span>Git</span> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-bar"> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-level skill-purple" style="width: 55%"></div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
<!-- </div> -->

<!-- <div class="skill"> -->
<!-- <span>Python</span> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-bar"> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-level skill-purple" style="width: 20%"></div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
<!-- </div> -->

<!-- <div class="skill"> -->
<!-- <span>CSS</span> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-bar"> -->
<!-- <div class="skill-level skill-purple" style="width: 5%"></div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
<!-- </div> -->


### Languages
<div class="skills-wrapper">

<div class="skill-dots" data-level="100" data-color="green">
  <span>German</span>
  <div class="dots"></div>
</div>

<div class="skill-dots" data-level="90" data-color="green">
  <span>English</span>
  <div class="dots"></div>
</div>

<div class="skill-dots" data-level="90" data-color="green">
  <span>Spanish</span>
  <div class="dots"></div>
</div>

<div class="skill-dots" data-level="60" data-color="green">
  <span>Swedish</span>
  <div class="dots"></div>
</div>


</div>


### Programming
<div class="skills-wrapper">

<div class="skill-dots" data-level="95" data-color="purple">
  <span>R</span>
  <div class="dots"></div>
</div>

<div class="skill-dots" data-level="55" data-color="purple">
  <span>Git</span>
  <div class="dots"></div>
</div>

<div class="skill-dots" data-level="20" data-color="purple">
  <span>Python</span>
  <div class="dots"></div>
</div>

<div class="skill-dots" data-level="5" data-color="purple">
  <span>CSS</span>
  <div class="dots"></div>
</div>

</div>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
## About
My Name is Emilio Sánchez and I am a landscape ecologist from Germany with specialization in remote sensing, machine learning and botany.

---

### Education

**M.Sc. Landscape Ecology**   
<span class="muted">Oct 2023-Present · [University Münster](https://www.uni-muenster.de/Landschaftsoekologie/en/index.shtml)     
Focus: *Remote Sensing, Restoration Ecology, Soil Ecology*   
Thesis: *Canopy height mapping from optical remote sensing data: reassessing deep learning methods.*</span>    

**B.Sc. Landscape Ecology**  
<span class="muted">Oct 2019-Sep 2022 · [University Münster](https://www.uni-muenster.de/Landschaftsoekologie/en/index.shtml)     
Thesis: *Spatio-temporal analysis of a central European bog.*</span>    

<!-- | [University Münster](https://www.uni-muenster.de/Landschaftsoekologie/en/index.shtml) _(Oct 2019 - Sep 2022)_   -->
<!-- Thesis: *Spatio-temporal analysis of a central European bog.*  -->

---

### Experience

**Field Inspector**  | Freelance  
<span class="muted">2022–Present · Control of agricultural fields</span>

<!-- **Field Inspector** | Freelance   -->
<!-- _Annualy since 2022_   -->
<!-- Control of agricultural fields.  -->

**Student Assistant** | Institute of Landscape Ecology  
<span class="muted">Sep 2025 - Feb 2026 · Analysis of deep learning models</span>  

**Student Assistant** | Institute of Landscape Ecology  
<span class="muted">Apr - Sep 2023 · Botany tutor</span>  

**Ecological Mapping** | LAKI GBR  
<span class="muted">May - July 2022 · Ecological mappings of vegetation.</span>    

**Student Assistant** | Institute of Landscape Ecology  
<span class="muted">Apr - Sep 2022 · Field Equipment rental</span>  

**Intern** | EFTAS Remote Sensing  
<span class="muted">Oct - Nov 2021 · Machine learning and reproducible workflows.</span>  

---

### Memberships

- Floristisch-soziologische Arbeitsgemeinschaft e.V. (FlorSoz)

---

### Skills

- Processing of ecological- and spatial data 
- Data analysis and visualization
- Scientific writing
- Organisational talent
- Project Management (University training)

---

### Activities

- Volunteer at THW (Federal Agency for Technical Relief)
- Sports  
    - Biking and trail running  
    - Team sports at University  
- Woodworking
- Gardening
- DIY-Projects


:::

:::


<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  document.querySelectorAll(".skill-dots").forEach(skill => {
    const level = parseInt(skill.dataset.level) || 0;
    const color = skill.dataset.color || "green";
    const dotsContainer = skill.querySelector(".dots");

    const totalDots = 5;
    const filledDots = Math.round((level / 100) * totalDots);

    dotsContainer.innerHTML = "";

    for (let i = 0; i < totalDots; i++) {
      const dot = document.createElement("span");
      dot.classList.add("dot");
      if (i < filledDots) {
        dot.classList.add("filled", color);
      }
      dotsContainer.appendChild(dot);
    }
  });
});
</script>
